Bash(git -C D:/Orbix/blackholeglow commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
🐱 BlackCat3D: texture-swap blink system + re-exported models

- Rewrite BlackCat3D.java: remove morph targets, add texture swap blink
  \(eye_open → eye_half → eye_closed cycle every 4s\)
- Split cat model: body \(Object_12+Object_16\) and eyes \(Object_14 iris only\)
- Re-export OBJs centered at origin \(fix world-space coordinates\)
- Add eye sprite textures: eye_open.png, eye_half.png, eye_closed.png
- Body+sclera use atlas texture, iris uses swappable eye sprites
- WIP: geometry/textures still being calibrated on device

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(__NEW_LINE_22b66729a1fd8f37__ echo "=== Uploading model to wallpaper-models ===")
Bash(__NEW_LINE_f6c62d04d9ae8127__ echo "=== Uploading textures to wallpaper-images ===")
Bash(for f in cat_open.png cat_half.png cat_closed.png)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_c71527b5bdfd814c__ echo "=== Uploading preview to wallpaper-videos ===")
Bash(__NEW_LINE_a146125f3ef9d604__ echo "=== Uploading textures to wallpaper-videos ===")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
🐱 Moonlit Cat: clean UV blink system + Supabase integration

- Re-baked cat model with clean UV layout \(eyes as separate large islands\)
- 3 atlas textures for blink: cat_open, cat_half, cat_closed
- Updated BlackCat3D to use new model + textures
- Updated ResourcePreloader with correct asset filenames
- Registered assets in ModelConfig + ImageConfig for Supabase download
- Uploaded all assets to Supabase storage buckets
- Removed 9 obsolete model/texture files \(~3MB savings\)
- Set EDIT_MODE = false in MoonlitCatScene for production

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(__NEW_LINE_b3a08cd314297b97__ for file in sky_moon.png mountains.png sakura_alpha.png torii_alpha.png lantern_alpha.png bridge_alpha.png bamboo_alpha.png foliage_alpha.png)
